assessment.note: Describes a months-long plateau doing similar work, which signals strong uncertainty about future ownership and direction; also reveals a growth stall worth carrying into next session. [THREAD-DEFERRED] 'similar work for months' plateau not drilled because drill cap requires advancing the arc.

new_queue.label: Support ask
new_queue.name: What do you need from me to keep the next two weeks moving cleanly?
new_queue.description: Identifies the specific support or decision she needs from her manager to stay unblocked.

new_queue.label: Close the loop
new_queue.name: Given what we covered, where do you want to focus first?
new_queue.description: Ends on an open next-step focus without sounding like a checklist stop.
